rows.description: pro tribus Partibus Jo Kidl. Augm.
rows.notes: Description is abbreviated ('pro tribus Partibus Jo Kidl. Augm.') and somewhat cramped. Amount (19 | 13 | 4) is visible but alignment within nested brace groups introduces moderate uncertainty.

rows.description: Stipend pro 4ta Parte Jo Kidl. Augm.
rows.notes: Description reads as 'Stipend pro 4ta Parte Jo Kidl. Augm.' Amount is ambiguous: the manuscript shows '9 19 0' with a small trailing loop after the pence that resembles a halfpenny symbol ('ob'). Interpreted as 9 pounds, 19 shillings, 0 pence and a halfpenny (0.5) — but the halfpenny mark is faint. Currency still valid (shillings 19). Confidence reduced due to faint fraction mark.
rows.english_description: Stipend representing the fourth part of the augmentation for John Kidlington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend representing the fourth part of the augmentation for John Kidlington, amounting to £9 19s 0.5d.

rows.notes: Another item in the grouped block reads similarly to prior 'Dna Shiers' lines. Amount (33 | 6 | 8) visible but repeated nature and cramped writing create moderate uncertainty about exact textual label.
rows.english_description: Repeat stipend payment to Mrs Shiers.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Repeat stipend payment to Mrs Shiers, amounting to £33 6s 8d.

rows.notes: A 'Divid.' line appears again in the group. Amount shows as 50 | 0 | 0 but the grouping makes the pairing moderately uncertain.
rows.english_description: Dividend payable to Mrs Shiers.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend payable to Mrs Shiers, amounting to £50 0s 0d.

rows.description: Stipend pro Augm. Roch. Jo Longwittonham
rows.notes: There is a short line lower in the block with '26' written in the pounds column only. The description appears to read 'pro Augm. Roch. Jo Longwittonham' but the manuscript is faded and the shillings/pence columns for this line are blank (only '26' is penned). Very uncertain pairing between description and that lone '26'.
rows.english_description: Stipend for the augmentation relating to the living of Roch for John Longwittonham.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend for the augmentation relating to the living of Roch for John Longwittonham, amounting to £26 0s 0d.

rows.description: Stipend pro Augm. Roch. Jo Longwittonham (cont.)
rows.notes: Lower in same area another line shows '23 4 6' with a faint trailing flourish after the pence that resembles three-farthings ('3q' => 0.75). Description is similar to prior but the handwriting and the fractional mark are both faint; chosen reading is tentative. Currency validated (pence 6).
rows.english_description: Further stipend payment continuing the augmentation for John Longwittonham of Roch.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Further stipend payment continuing the augmentation for John Longwittonham of Roch, amounting to £23 4s 6.75d.

rows.notes: Short centered/local heading 'Bassanis' (spelling as written). No amount on this header line.

rows.notes: Bottom-most drawn total reads as '522 10 2 9' when inspected; the extra trailing digit after the pence is ambiguous (appears as an extra '9' or a flourish). To preserve currency validation (pence must be 0–11) I set pence to 2 and left fraction blank. The exact meaning of the trailing '9' is unclear (could be notation or misaligned digit); therefore confidence is low.
